title: bupleurum atlanticum subsp. mairei
intro: Bupleurum atlanticum subsp. mairei, also known as Maire's Bupleurum, is a subspecies of perennial plant that belongs to the Bupleurum genus, commonly found in the Western Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-viral activities. The health benefits of Maire's Bupleurum include its potential to reduce stress, improve liver function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Maire's Bupleurum include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy balance within the body.
